rows:
Tawny Kilkernan – 
Born-1832 (Alberta, Canada)
Ghouled-1857, (London, England)
Embraced-1907, (London, England)

Tawny was the third daughter of then Captain, the Honorable, Thomas Kilkernan.  The Captain was stationed abroad from 1828 – 1854 when he entered Royal Service as Deputy Chamberlain to the Queen.  This change in lifestyle greatly affected the family, Miss Tawny was engaged in 1855 though her fiancée died late that year.  She was engaged again in 1856 and her fiancée was killed in service in Africa.  She was seen as an effective social manager in the salons of London and carefully managed her father’s social obligations as her mother had died in 1854, she managed through her diligent efforts to gain her father admission to several clubs and social events that even his rank would not have made available to him.  She was scouted and eventually ghouled by Lady Patricia Velinng a member of the London court, Lady Patricia being a Harpy of the London Court was greatly enthused to have such a skilled social manager on her staff.
Skip forward to 1907 during the fall of Lady Patricia during her implication in “deviltry” and “discord” during the actions of March 14th, 1907.  The events surrounding the chaos and problems of a Sabbat attack upon a meeting of the Primogen and the culmination of several plots of the Malkavian to discredit the Ventrue Harpy who had chastised them several times.  Lady Patricia met the sun less than a week after her accusers had her entombed “as a safety measure” by edict of a majority of the Primogen.  Lord Haroldson took in the household of Lady Patricia and sought to find uses for them so that they would not be killed or cast out, especially since they were potential Masquerade breaches if they were cast out.  He quickly learned that a large part of Lady Patricia’s success as Harpy was due to the fact that she was supported by Miss Tawny in her duties.  He came to welcome her counsel and after a period of several months he petitioned and received the opportunity to offer her the embrace.  She accepted and was welcomed into Clan Ventrue as a fledgling.  She has been working with and for Lawrence since then, she is a trusted agent of his and the two have worked for the benefit of Clan Ventrue and London in many cases.  
Tawny is cautious but decisive when she acts, she is more than willing to give people the benefit of the doubt, yet is not afraid to use her powers of Dominate to get the truth out as soon as possible rather than waste her time.  She knows that she does not have the political acumen that Lawrence does (or at least that he does back in London, he is always rough in the hinterlands).  She has been called by Lawrence away from a much deserved vacation in Canada after their last operation in Belize.  What she has been told about the Clan in LA does not leave her with a lot of hope that they can learn to work together in time to retrieve the book, and if that happens then Lawrence will be stuck here for months.   The Queen does not take failure lightly, and failing to retrieve this book will go badly for anyone involved.
